requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign requirements for servers and data storage products
requirement_topic.zh: 服务器及数据存储产品生态设计要求
requirement_topic.zht: 伺服器及數據存儲產品生態設計要求

summary.en: Regulation (EU) 2019/424 sets mandatory ecodesign requirements for servers and data storage products placed on the EU market, covering energy efficiency metrics (idle power, active efficiency), product information requirements, and mandatory reporting of energy performance data. Manufacturers must ensure servers meet minimum energy efficiency thresholds and provide technical documentation. Applies to enterprise servers, microservers, and data storage products.
summary.zh: 欧盟法规(EU) 2019/424对在欧盟市场销售的服务器及数据存储产品设定了强制性生态设计要求，涵盖能效指标（待机功耗、主动效率）、产品信息要求及能效数据强制报告。制造商须确保服务器符合最低能效门槛并提供技术文件。适用于企业级服务器、微型服务器及数据存储产品。
summary.zht: 歐盟法規(EU) 2019/424對在歐盟市場銷售的伺服器及數據存儲產品設定了強制性生態設計要求，涵蓋能效指標（待機功耗、主動效率）、產品信息要求及能效數據強制報告。製造商須確保伺服器符合最低能效門檻並提供技術文件。適用於企業級伺服器、微型伺服器及數據存儲產品。

standards_or_laws.name: Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/424 — Ecodesign requirements for servers and data storage products

summary.en: China addresses server energy efficiency through GB 40879-2021 (Energy efficiency limits and grades for data centres) and GB/T 51409-2021 (Technical standard for green data centres). These set PUE limits and energy efficiency grades for data centre infrastructure, but do not directly impose product-level ecodesign obligations equivalent to EU 2019/424. Server product energy efficiency is partially addressed under separate GB standards for IT equipment (e.g., GB 28380 series ). No single mandatory CN regulation mirrors the EU server ecodesign product registration and reporting mechanism.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 40879-2021（数据中心能效限定值及能效等级）和GB/T 51409-2021（绿色数据中心技术标准）管理数据中心能效，规定PUE限值及能效等级，但未对服务器产品设定等同于EU 2019/424的生态设计义务。服务器产品能效部分由IT设备相关GB标准（如GB 28380系列）涵盖。目前无单一强制性中国法规完全对应欧盟服务器生态设计产品注册及报告机制。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 40879-2021（數據中心能效限定值及能效等級）和GB/T 51409-2021（綠色數據中心技術標準）管理數據中心能效，規定PUE限值及能效等級，但未對伺服器產品設定等同於EU 2019/424的生態設計義務。伺服器產品能效部分由IT設備相關GB標準（如GB 28380系列）涵蓋。目前無單一強制性中國法規完全對應歐盟伺服器生態設計產品登記及報告機制。

standards_or_laws.name: GB 40879-2021 — 数据中心能效限定值及能效等级 (Energy efficiency limits and grades for data centres)
standards_or_laws.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) / SAC

standards_or_laws.name: GB/T 51409-2021 — 绿色数据中心技术标准 (Technical standard for green data centres)
standards_or_laws.publisher: Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD)

gap.en: EU Regulation 2019/424 imposes product-level mandatory ecodesign requirements (idle power, active efficiency, product information disclosure, technical documentation) on servers and data storage equipment sold in the EU. China has no direct equivalent product-level ecodesign regulation for servers; GB 40879 and GB/T 51409 target data-centre-level PUE and infrastructure efficiency rather than individual server product performance. Chinese liquid-cooling products for data centres destined for the EU market must comply with EU 2019/424 product obligations, which currently have no CN regulatory mirror. Exporters face a gap in mandatory product-level energy labelling and efficiency documentation requirements.
gap.zh: 欧盟法规2019/424对在欧盟销售的服务器及数据存储设备设定产品级强制生态设计要求（待机功耗、主动效率、产品信息披露、技术文件）。中国目前无对应的服务器产品级生态设计法规；GB 40879及GB/T 51409针对数据中心级PUE及基础设施效率，而非单台服务器产品性能。面向欧盟市场的中国液冷产品须满足EU 2019/424产品义务，而该义务在中国法规中尚无对应。出口商面临强制产品能效标签及效率文件要求方面的合规差距。
gap.zht: 歐盟法規2019/424對在歐盟銷售的伺服器及數據存儲設備設定產品級強制生態設計要求（待機功耗、主動效率、產品信息披露、技術文件）。中國目前無對應的伺服器產品級生態設計法規；GB 40879及GB/T 51409針對數據中心級PUE及基礎設施效率，而非單台伺服器產品性能。面向歐盟市場的中國液冷產品須滿足EU 2019/424產品義務，而該義務在中國法規中尚無對應。出口商面臨強制產品能效標籤及效率文件要求方面的合規差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — binding on all servers and data storage products placed on EU market
mandatory_status.cn: No direct mandatory equivalent at product level; GB 40879 mandatory for data-centre operators in CN

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Products (servers, data storage) sold in the EU must comply with Regulation (EU) 2019/424 ecodesign requirements — this is a mandatory product obligation. Chinese manufacturers exporting servers or data-centre cooling equipment to the EU must meet EU energy efficiency thresholds and documentation requirements. No equivalent product-level CN regulation exists; compliance requires EU-specific conformity assessment. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在欧盟销售的产品（服务器、数据存储）须符合欧盟法规2019/424生态设计要求——这是强制性产品义务。向欧盟出口服务器或数据中心冷却设备的中国制造商须满足欧盟能效门槛及文件要求。目前无等同的中国产品级法规；合规需进行欧盟专项合格评定。以上信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在歐盟銷售的產品（伺服器、數據存儲）須符合歐盟法規2019/424生態設計要求——這是強制性產品義務。向歐盟出口伺服器或數據中心冷卻設備的中國製造商須滿足歐盟能效門檻及文件要求。目前無等同的中國產品級法規；合規需進行歐盟專項合格評定。以上信息僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: EU data-centre energy performance reporting — PUE disclosure and EN 50600 facility standards
requirement_topic.zh: 欧盟数据中心能效报告——PUE披露及EN 50600设施标准
requirement_topic.zht: 歐盟數據中心能效報告——PUE披露及EN 50600設施標準

summary.en: Energy Efficiency Directive (EU) 2023/1791 Article 12 requires operators of data centres with IT load ≥500 kW to report energy performance data (incl. PUE, renewable energy use, water usage, waste heat) to a designated EU database annually from 15 May 2024. Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2024/1364 specifies the exact data points and reporting format. EN 50600 series (IEC/EN 50600-1 to 50600-4) is a voluntary European technical standard family for data-centre facilities and infrastructure, including cooling efficiency and PUE-related metrics; it may support compliance evidence or contractual specifications but is not itself the mandatory legal obligation. The EU Code of Conduct on Data Centre Energy Efficiency (voluntary) provides best-practice guidance on cooling optimisation.
summary.zh: 《能效指令》(EU) 2023/1791第12条要求IT负荷≥500千瓦的数据中心运营商自2024年5月15日起每年向欧盟指定数据库报告能效数据（含PUE、可再生能源使用、用水量、余热）。委托法规(EU) 2024/1364规定了具体数据点及报告格式。EN 50600系列（IEC/EN 50600-1至50600-4）是关于数据中心设施及基础设施（含冷却效率和PUE相关指标）的自愿性欧洲技术标准，可用于支持合规证据或合同技术规格，但其本身不是强制性法律义务。欧盟数据中心能效行为准则（自愿性）提供冷却优化最佳实践指引。
summary.zht: 《能效指令》(EU) 2023/1791第12條要求IT負荷≥500千瓦的數據中心運營商自2024年5月15日起每年向歐盟指定數據庫報告能效數據（含PUE、可再生能源使用、用水量、餘熱）。委托法規(EU) 2024/1364規定了具體數據點及報告格式。EN 50600系列（IEC/EN 50600-1至50600-4）是關於數據中心設施及基礎設施（含冷卻效率和PUE相關指標）的自願性歐洲技術標準，可用於支持合規證據或合同技術規格，但其本身不是強制性法律義務。歐盟數據中心能效行為準則（自願性）提供冷卻優化最佳實踐指引。

standards_or_laws.name: Directive (EU) 2023/1791 — Energy Efficiency Directive (recast), Article 12: Data centres
Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2024/1364 — data points and format for data-centre energy performance reporting
EN 50600 series — Information technology: Data centre facilities and infrastructures (cooling efficiency, PUE classification)
EU Code of Conduct on Data Centre Energy Efficiency (voluntary)

summary.en: China requires PUE reporting for large data centres under national and provincial policies. GB 40879-2021 sets mandatory PUE energy efficiency limits (e.g., PUE ≤ 1.4 for new data centres in most regions ). The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT) issued guidelines requiring new large data centres to meet PUE ≤ 1.3 in hot climates and ≤ 1.25 in cold climates . China does not have a direct equivalent to EN 50600 as a harmonised facility standard; GB/T 51400 series may partially address data-centre engineering. Voluntary green data-centre certification schemes exist (e.g., MIIT green data-centre list). Reporting to a central EU-style public database is not required under current CN law.
summary.zh: 中国通过国家及地方政策要求大型数据中心报告PUE。GB 40879-2021规定强制性PUE能效限值（如大多数地区新建数据中心PUE≤1.4）。工业和信息化部（工信部）发布指引要求新建大型数据中心在热带气候达到PUE≤1.3、在寒冷气候达到PUE≤1.25。中国目前无与EN 50600等同的统一设施标准；GB/T 51400系列或部分涵盖数据中心工程。现有自愿性绿色数据中心认证体系（如工信部绿色数据中心名单）。现行中国法律不要求向类似欧盟的中央公开数据库报告。
summary.zht: 中國通過國家及地方政策要求大型數據中心報告PUE。GB 40879-2021規定強制性PUE能效限值（如大多數地區新建數據中心PUE≤1.4）。工業和信息化部（工信部）發布指引要求新建大型數據中心在熱帶氣候達到PUE≤1.3、在寒冷氣候達到PUE≤1.25。中國目前無與EN 50600等同的統一設施標準；GB/T 51400系列或部分涵蓋數據中心工程。現有自願性綠色數據中心認證體系（如工信部綠色數據中心名單）。現行中國法律不要求向類似歐盟的中央公開數據庫報告。

standards_or_laws.name: GB 40879-2021 — 数据中心能效限定值及能效等级 (Energy efficiency limits and grades for data centres)
standards_or_laws.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) / SAC

standards_or_laws.name: GB/T 51409-2021 — 绿色数据中心技术标准 (Technical standard for green data centres)
standards_or_laws.publisher: Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD)

gap.en: EU EED Article 12 + Delegated Regulation 2024/1364 create a mandatory annual PUE and energy-data reporting obligation to an EU public database for data centres ≥500 kW operating in the EU — this has no CN equivalent obligation. EN 50600 provides voluntary technical classifications for cooling efficiency and facility performance that differ from the CN GB framework; it may be used as supporting evidence or a contractual benchmark, but the mandatory duty comes from the Directive and Delegated Regulation. Chinese liquid-cooling equipment suppliers whose products are installed in EU data centres may be asked to provide performance data compatible with EN 50600 cooling metrics. The CN PUE approach is directionally similar but the specific thresholds, reporting format, and public disclosure obligations diverge significantly from the EU regime.
gap.zh: 欧盟EED第12条及委托法规2024/1364要求在欧盟运营的≥500千瓦数据中心每年向欧盟公开数据库强制报告PUE及能耗数据——中国无对应义务。EN 50600提供冷却效率及设施性能的自愿性技术分类，与中国GB框架存在差异；它可作为支持性证据或合同基准，但强制义务来自指令及委托法规本身。产品安装于欧盟数据中心的中国液冷设备供应商，可能被要求提供符合EN 50600冷却指标的性能数据。中国PUE方法方向相似，但具体门槛、报告格式及公开披露义务与欧盟制度存在显著差异。
gap.zht: 歐盟EED第12條及委托法規2024/1364要求在歐盟運營的≥500千瓦數據中心每年向歐盟公開數據庫強制報告PUE及能耗數據——中國無對應義務。EN 50600提供冷卻效率及設施性能的自願性技術分類，與中國GB框架存在差異；它可作為支持性證據或合同基準，但強制義務來自指令及委托法規本身。產品安裝於歐盟數據中心的中國液冷設備供應商，可能被要求提供符合EN 50600冷卻指標的性能數據。中國PUE方法方向相似，但具體門檻、報告格式及公開披露義務與歐盟制度存在顯著差異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU) — EED Art.12 reporting obligation for data-centre operators ≥500 kW from 15 May 2024 and Delegated Regulation (EU) 2024/1364 data-point rules; EN 50600 and EU CoC are voluntary technical/supporting references
mandatory_status.cn: GB 40879 mandatory for CN data-centre operators; PUE policy targets mandatory via MIIT guidelines ; no mandatory public reporting equivalent

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Data centres operating in the EU with IT load ≥500 kW are subject to mandatory annual energy performance reporting under EED (EU) 2023/1791 Article 12 and Delegated Regulation (EU) 2024/1364 from May 2024. Cooling equipment and liquid-cooling solutions supplied into these facilities should be capable of providing PUE-compatible performance data, and may use EN 50600-aligned metrics as voluntary support for operator compliance or contract specifications. Chinese manufacturers face a gap: CN regulatory frameworks do not require equivalent public reporting or EN 50600-format documentation. EU-market compliance requires understanding and supporting the legal reporting obligations. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在欧盟运营的IT负荷≥500千瓦数据中心，须自2024年5月起依据EED (EU) 2023/1791第12条及委托法规(EU) 2024/1364履行强制性年度能效报告义务。向该类设施供应冷却及液冷解决方案的供应商，应能提供与PUE兼容的性能数据，并可采用与EN 50600一致的指标作为运营商合规或合同技术规格的自愿性支持。中国制造商面临差距：中国法规框架不要求等同的公开报告或EN 50600格式文件。面向欧盟市场须理解并支持法律报告义务。以上信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在歐盟運營的IT負荷≥500千瓦數據中心，須自2024年5月起依據EED (EU) 2023/1791第12條及委托法規(EU) 2024/1364履行強制性年度能效報告義務。向該類設施供應冷卻及液冷解決方案的供應商，應能提供與PUE兼容的性能數據，並可採用與EN 50600一致的指標作為運營商合規或合同技術規格的自願性支持。中國製造商面臨差距：中國法規框架不要求等同的公開報告或EN 50600格式文件。面向歐盟市場須理解並支持法律報告義務。以上信息僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
